cases.prompt: Vue 반응성 깨졌어. Pinia 상태관리도 정리하고 컴포넌트 최적화해줘.

assertions.text: Diagnoses against the reactivity-loss anti-pattern catalog (destructure / plain assignment)
Structures Pinia as a setup-store and applies ref vs reactive vs shallowRef decisions

cases.prompt: vue composition api best practices — clean up my components

assertions.text: Extracts composables and applies performance fixes (v-memo, shallowRef, defineAsyncComponent)
Verifies via vue-tsc + vite build, targeting Vue 3.5.x
